info.name: HMarketplace E-commerce API Suite v2
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for the HMarketplace backend.

Coverage: Health, Auth, Users, Sellers, Addresses, Categories,
Products (JSON + HTML Rich-Text + YAML), Product Images, Product Variants,
Cart, Coupons, Orders, Reviews, Q&A, Shipping Profiles, Stores, and Webhooks.

All write requests include automated test assertions.
Response variable extraction populates collection variables automatically.

Product endpoints now support three content modes:
  1. Standard JSON with nested description object and dynamic specifications.
  2. HTML rich-text (TipTap/ProseMirror) in description field.
  3. Raw YAML via Content-Type: text/yaml or via the yamlPayload JSON field.

request.description: Server + DB health probe.
Fetch the raw developer server guide (plain text markdown).

item.name: Authentication & Users
item.description: All authentication, registration, session, and user management endpoints.

request.description: Register a new customer account. Returns the user object on success.

exec: headers = Object.keys(h).map(function(k) { return { key: k, value: h[k] }; });

request.description: Login and receive a session cookie for subsequent authenticated requests.

exec: headers = Object.keys(h).map(function(k) { return { key: k, value: h[k] }; });

request.description: Login as seller user. Cookie is shared across the session.

exec: headers = Object.keys(h).map(function(k) { return { key: k, value: h[k] }; });

request.description: Login as admin user to execute administrative operations.

exec: headers = Object.keys(h).map(function(k) { return { key: k, value: h[k] }; });

request.description: Fetch the currently authenticated user's profile.
Update the authenticated user's profile (supports optional avatar upload).
Admin-only: list all registered users.
Fetch a specific user by their ID.
Admin-only: enable or disable a user account.
Permanently deletes the authenticated user's own account.
Admin-only: delete any user account.
Destroys the current session and clears the session cookie.

item.name: Sellers
item.description: Seller onboarding, profile management, and admin control endpoints.

request.description: Unified Seller onboarding: creates both the seller user account and business profile.

exec: headers = Object.keys(h).map(function(k) { return { key: k, value: h[k] }; });

request.description: Fetch the authenticated seller's own business profile.
Update the seller's own business profile fields.
Admin-only: paginated list of all registered sellers.
Publicly accessible seller business details page.
Admin-only: approve or suspend a seller.
Deletes the authenticated seller's own profile.
Admin-only: permanently removes a seller account.
Fetch pro-rated financial sales and revenue analytics, low-stock notifications, and review logs cached in Redis.
Sellers can register custom brands pending admin verification.
Sellers retrieve their list of custom brands.
Admin approves a seller's custom brand.
Sellers register an offer listing for a product variant, initializing inventory logs and pricing history.
Sellers retrieve their list of offer listings.
Sellers update pricing or stock, logging historical pricing logs and clearing Redis analytics caches.
Sellers delete an offer listing, cascadingly purging inventory records, pricing histories, and clear Redis analytics caches.
Creates a new delivery address for the authenticated user.
Lists all saved delivery addresses for the authenticated user.
Fetch a single address record by ID.
Partially update an existing address record.
Permanently deletes a saved address.

item.name: Products
item.description: End-to-end product catalog management: categories, products (JSON/HTML/YAML), images, and variants.

request.description: Admin-only: creates a new product category.
Public: returns all active product categories.

item.name: Product CRUD
item.description: Full product CRUD including JSON, HTML rich-text, and YAML input formats.

body.raw:
{ "categoryId": "{{categoryId}}", "title": "boAt Airdopes Alpha", "description": { "short": "Premium true wireless earbuds with 35-hour playback and ENx technology.", "long": "

boAt Airdopes Alpha

Experience unmatched audio clarity with ENx noise-cancellation and up to 35 hours of total playback time. IPX4-rated, Type-C charging, and seamless Bluetooth 5.3 connectivity make these the perfect daily companion.

" }, "brand": "boAt", "sku": "BOAT-ALPHA-BLK-001", "pricePaise": 499900, "comparePricePaise": 699900, "inventory": 200, "tags": [ "boat", "earbuds", "tws", "bluetooth" ], "highlights": [ "35 Hours Total Playback", "ENx Technology", "IPX4 Water Resistant", "Type-C Charging", "Bluetooth 5.3" ], "specifications": { "battery": "75mAh (earbuds) + 600mAh (case)", "connectivity": "Bluetooth 5.3", "driver": "10mm Dynamic Driver", "waterRating": "IPX4" }, "attributeValues": { "color": "Midnight Black", "storage": "N/A", "material": "ABS Plastic" }, "seo": { "metaTitle": "boAt Airdopes Alpha – Best TWS Earbuds Under ₹5000", "metaDescription": "Shop boAt Airdopes Alpha with 35-hour playback, ENx technology, IPX4 rating. Free delivery.", "canonicalUrl": "https://hmarketplace.in/products/boat-airdopes-alpha" }, "variantAttributes": { "color": "Midnight Black", "option1": "Midnight Black" }, "barcode": "8906109342812", "weight": 0.3, "dimensions": { "length": 6.5, "width": 4.5, "height": 3, "unit": "cm" } }

request.description: Seller: Creates a new catalog product with JSON body. Supports nested description object, rich specifications, variant attributes, SEO metadata, and physical dimensions.

exec: pm.test("product or jobId present", () => pm.expect(d.product || d.jobId).to.exist);

request.description: Seller: Creates a product where `description` is raw HTML (rich text editor output) and `richDescription` holds structured editor JSON (Tiptap/ProseMirror blocks).

body.raw:
categoryId: "{{categoryId}}" title: "Apple iPhone 15 128GB" description: short: "Apple iPhone 15 with Dynamic Island and USB-C charging." long: |

Apple iPhone 15

Powered by the A16 Bionic chip with 48MP main camera, Dynamic Island, and USB-C charging port.

brand: "Apple" sku: "APPLE-IP15-BLK-128" pricePaise: 7999900 comparePricePaise: 8499900 inventory: 100 tags: - apple - iphone - smartphone highlights: - Dynamic Island - 48MP Main Camera - USB-C Charging - A16 Bionic Chip specifications: display: "6.1-inch Super Retina XDR" chip: "A16 Bionic" storage: "128GB" camera: "48MP + 12MP Dual System" battery: "3877 mAh" os: "iOS 17" attributeValues: color: "Black Titanium" storage: "128GB" seo: metaTitle: "iPhone 15 128GB – Buy at HMarketplace" metaDescription: "Apple iPhone 15 128GB with A16 Bionic, 48MP camera, and USB-C. Fast shipping across India." canonicalUrl: "https://hmarketplace.in/products/apple-iphone-15-128gb" variantAttributes: color: "Black Titanium" storage: "128GB" barcode: "0194253386568" weight: 0.171 dimensions: length: 14.76 width: 7.12 height: 0.78 unit: cm

request.description: Seller: Creates a product from a raw YAML payload. Set Content-Type to 'text/yaml' or include yamlPayload field. All new enterprise fields are supported: nested description, specifications, attributeValues, seo, dimensions, variantAttributes.

body.raw:
{ "yamlPayload": "categoryId: "{{categoryId}}" title: "Nike Air Max 270" description: short: "Nike Air Max 270 running shoes with full-length Air unit." long: |

Nike Air Max 270

Featuring Nike's largest heel Air unit yet for all-day cushioning.

brand: "Nike" sku: "NIKE-AIRMAX270-WHT-42" pricePaise: 1299900 comparePricePaise: 1499900 inventory: 75 tags: - nike - shoes - running specifications: sole: "Rubber" upper: "Engineered mesh" closure: "Lace-up" origin: "Vietnam" variantAttributes: color: "White/Black" size: "UK 8" barcode: "0881562041833" weight: 0.7 dimensions: length: 32.0 width: 12.0 height: 12.0 unit: cm" }

request.description: Alternative: send YAML as a JSON field 'yamlPayload'. Useful when the HTTP client cannot send raw YAML Content-Type.
Public: paginated product listing with optional filters: categoryId, brand, tag, search, minPrice, maxPrice, sort (newest|priceAsc|priceDesc), page, limit.

exec: pm.test("pagination fields", () => { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.total).to.be.a("number"); pm.expect(d.pages).to.be.a("number"); });

request.description: Public: full-text search across title, description, and keywords.

item.name: Get Products – Filtered by Price Range

request.description: Public: filter products by price range (in paise). 100000 paise = ₹1000.
Public: detailed product view by URL slug. Returns variants, listings, inventory, and pricing.
Seller: partially update a product. All new enterprise fields (specifications, attributeValues, richDescription, seo) are patched individually.

body.raw:
{
  "yamlPayload": "title: "boAt Airdopes Alpha v2"
pricePaise: 459900
inventory: 160
specifications:
  battery: "80mAh (earbuds) + 650mAh (case)"
  driver: "11mm Dynamic Driver"
seo:
  metaTitle: "boAt Airdopes Alpha v2 – Best TWS"
  metaDescription: "Updated listing with improved driver size.""
}

request.description: Seller: update product using a YAML payload sent as a JSON field.
Seller or Admin: cascades deletion across variants, images, seller listings, inventories, and pricing history.
Seller: upload up to 10 product images per request. Uses multipart/form-data.
Seller: delete a specific product image by its ID. Also removes the file from Cloudinary.
Seller: creates a variant of an existing catalog product. Dynamic variantAttributes support any custom key-value pairs (color, size, storage, material, style, etc.).
Seller: update variant attributes, physical dimensions, or pricing.
Seller: remove a product variant and its associated seller listings.

item.name: Cart
item.description: Customer cart management: view, sync, apply coupon, and clear.

request.description: Fetch the authenticated customer's persistent cart.
Merge/sync local (guest) cart with the server-side persistent cart.
Apply a discount coupon to the current cart session.
Detach any applied coupon from the current cart.
Wipes all items from the authenticated customer's cart.

item.name: Coupons
item.description: Coupon lifecycle: create, list, validate, and delete.

request.description: Seller: create a new discount coupon campaign.
Seller: retrieve all coupons created by the authenticated seller.
Customer: validate a coupon code against a given cart total.
Seller: removes a coupon campaign.

item.name: Orders
item.description: Order lifecycle: placement, status tracking, cancellation, and fulfillment.

request.description: Customer: place a new order from cart items or direct item list.
Customer: paginated list of all orders placed by the authenticated user.
Seller: all orders containing variants listed by the authenticated seller.
Fetch full order details by ID (accessible to buyer, seller, and admin).
Customer: cancel a pending or processing order.
Seller/Admin: transition an order's fulfillment status.

item.name: Reviews & Q&A
item.description: Product review and community Q&A system.

request.description: Customer: submit a verified product review.
Public: paginated list of approved reviews for a product.
Customer: submit a product question visible to the seller and community.
Public: paginated Q&A thread for a product.
Seller or verified buyer: post an answer to a product question.
Public: list all answers for a given question.

item.name: Shipping & Stores
item.description: Seller shipping profiles and store/warehouse management.

request.description: Seller: create a shipping profile defining delivery terms and COD availability.
Seller: list all their shipping profiles.
Seller: register a physical store or warehouse location for inventory tracking.
Seller: list all their registered stores and warehouses.

item.name: Webhooks
item.description: Outgoing webhook subscription management for real-time event notifications.

request.description: Seller/Admin: subscribe to platform events. The server signs payloads with HMAC-SHA256.
Seller/Admin: list all active webhook subscriptions.
Seller/Admin: cancel and remove a webhook subscription.
